from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

llattrdata_path = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-EXTRACT/LLAttrData.csv"

df = (
    spark.read
         .option("header", True)
         .option("sep", "|")
         .option("quote", '"')
         .option("escape", '"')
         .option("multiLine", True)
         .csv(llattrdata_path)
)

print(df.columns)
print("Column count:", len(df.columns))
display(df.limit(5))

from pyspark.sql import functions as F

dfv = (
    df
    .withColumn("DefID", F.col("DefID").cast("int"))
    .withColumn("ID", F.col("ID").cast("long"))
    .withColumn("AttrID", F.col("AttrID").cast("int"))
    .withColumn("VerNum", F.col("VerNum").cast("int"))
    .withColumn("EntryNum", F.col("EntryNum").cast("int"))
    .withColumn("ParentKeyID", F.col("ParentKeyID").cast("int"))
    .withColumn(
        "Value",
        F.coalesce(
            F.col("ValStr"),
            F.col("ValLong"),
            F.col("ValInt").cast("string"),
            F.col("ValReal").cast("string"),
            F.date_format(F.col("ValDate").cast("timestamp"), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
        )
    )
    .select("DefID", "ID", "AttrID", "VerNum", "EntryNum", "ParentKeyID", "Value")
)

dfv.show(5, truncate=False)

dfv_good = (
    dfv
    .filter(F.col("DefID").isNotNull())
    .filter(F.col("ID").isNotNull())
    .filter(F.col("AttrID").isNotNull())
    .filter(F.col("Value").isNotNull())
)

print("Rows kept:", dfv_good.count())
print(dfv_good.columns)
display(dfv_good.limit(10))

# DefID -> friendly file/table name

    15809003: "Modification",

from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

def extract_one_defid(defid: int):

    d = dfv_good.filter(F.col("DefID") == defid)

    table = DEFID_TO_TABLE.get(defid, f"DefID_{defid}")
    out_dir = f"{output_base}/{table}_{defid}"

    if defid == 95501:
        # Case Involvement:
        # use ParentKeyID as the repeated row key
        # only pivot the actual visible involvement columns
        wide = (
            d
            .filter(F.col("AttrID").isin([3, 4, 16, 17, 18, 19, 20]))
            .filter(F.col("ParentKeyID").isNotNull())
            .groupBy("ID", "ParentKeyID")
            .pivot("AttrID")
            .agg(F.first("Value", ignorenulls=True))
            .orderBy("ID", "ParentKeyID")
        )

    elif defid == 95506:
        # keep existing repeated-row logic for this one
        w = Window.partitionBy("ID", "AttrID").orderBy(F.monotonically_increasing_id())

        d_occ = d.withColumn("row_instance", F.row_number().over(w))

        wide = (
            d_occ
            .groupBy("ID", "row_instance")
            .pivot("AttrID")
            .agg(F.first("Value", ignorenulls=True))
            .orderBy("ID", "row_instance")
        )

    else:
        wide = (
            d
            .groupBy("ID")
            .pivot("AttrID")
            .agg(F.first("Value", ignorenulls=True))
            .orderBy("ID")
        )

    wide_clean = wide
    for c in wide_clean.columns:
        wide_clean = wide_clean.withColumn(
            c,
            F.when(F.col(c).isNull(), None).otherwise(
                F.trim(
                    F.regexp_replace(
                        F.regexp_replace(
                            F.regexp_replace(
                                F.regexp_replace(
                                    F.col(c).cast("string"),
                                    r"[\r\n]+",
                                    " "
                                ),
                                r"\|",
                                "/"
                            ),
                            r'""',
                            '"'
                        ),
                        r"\s+",
                        " "
                    )
                )
            )
        )

    (
        wide_clean.write
        .mode("overwrite")
        .option("header", True)
        .option("sep", "|")
        .option("quote", '"')
        .option("escape", '"')
        .option("quoteAll", True)
        .csv(out_dir)
    )

    print(f"Wrote DefID {defid} -> {out_dir}")

CASE_INVOLVEMENT_PATH = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-EXTRACT/LLAttr/Case_Involvement_95501/"

case_involvement_extract = (
    spark.read
    .option("header", True)
    .option("sep", "|")
    .option("quote", '"')
    .option("escape", '"')
    .csv(CASE_INVOLVEMENT_PATH)
)

print("Rows:", case_involvement_extract.count())
print("Columns:", case_involvement_extract.columns)

display(
    case_involvement_extract
    .filter(F.col("ID").cast("string") == "20071315")
